dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: I am Joseph! Is my father still alive?

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: I am Joseph your brother, whom you sold into Egypt

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: And now do not be distressed or angry with yourselves because you sold me here, for God sent me before you to preserve life

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: For the famine has been in the land these two years, and there are yet five years in which there will be neither plowing nor harvest

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: And God sent me before you to preserve for you a remnant on earth, and to keep alive for you many survivors

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: So it was not you who sent me here, but God. He has made me a father to Pharaoh, and lord of all his house and ruler over all the land of Egypt

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: Hurry and go up to my father and say to him, 'Thus says your son Joseph: God has made me lord of all Egypt. Come down to me; do not tarry'

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: You shall dwell in the land of Goshen, and you shall be near me, you and your children and your children's children, and your flocks, your herds, and all that you have

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: There I will provide for you, for there are yet five years of famine to come, so that you and your household, and all that you have, do not come to poverty

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: And behold, your eyes see, and the eyes of my brother Benjamin see, that it is my mouth that speaks to you

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: You must tell my father of all my honor in Egypt, and of all that you have seen. Hurry and bring my father down here

dialogue.speaker: pharaoh-of-joseph
dialogue.englishText: Say to your brothers, 'Do this: load your animals and go back to the land of Canaan'

dialogue.speaker: pharaoh-of-joseph
dialogue.englishText: And take your father and your households, and come to me, and I will give you the best of the land of Egypt, and you shall eat the fat of the land

dialogue.speaker: pharaoh-of-joseph
dialogue.englishText: You are commanded to do this: take wagons from the land of Egypt for your little ones and for your wives, and bring your father, and come

dialogue.speaker: pharaoh-of-joseph
dialogue.englishText: Have no concern for your goods, for the best of all the land of Egypt is yours

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: Do not quarrel on the way

dialogue.speaker: jacob
dialogue.englishText: It is enough; Joseph my son is still alive. I will go and see him before I die
